name: Oberst Dietrich Raab
role: Stasi liaison officer, Ministry for State Security, East Berlin district command
publicFace: A senior officer in civilian clothes who arrives at the checkpoint in Act II with the bearing of a man who expects the situation to resolve itself in his favor
privateGoal: To document that the gate opening — if it occurs — was Jäger's unauthorized decision alone, so that the Ministry is insulated from responsibility for the breach
fear: That the Politburo will collapse entirely tonight and that his career, his apartment, and his pension will go with it
knowledge: He has received conflicting signals from district command and understands that no senior official wants responsibility for either a shooting order or an unauthorized opening. The silence from above is becoming its own form of instruction.
He has a file on Anna Schreiber — her eight months as a registered informant — and is aware she is in the crowd tonight
He knows that Jäger's phone calls have been logged and that Jäger's superiors have deliberately not responded — this is the paper trail Raab needs
voice: Smooth and indirect — never states his actual purpose, frames everything as administrative clarification, uses the passive voice to avoid assigning agency
trustLogic: Cannot be trusted; will appear cooperative with anyone who seems to have information useful to his documentation effort
secrets: He has already drafted a report placing sole responsibility for any breach on Jäger — the report is dated and timestamped before the gate opens
He has a personal bank account in a West German institution under a different name — he has been preparing for the GDR's collapse for two years

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Smiles and asks a clarifying question — appears to be on your side
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Produces his Stasi identification and shifts into a formal interrogation register — the warmth disappears entirely
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will never acknowledge the pre-drafted report or the West German bank account
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If the gate opens and the crowd floods through — he will leave the checkpoint immediately and file his report from the district office
aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Enters his official car and is driven away — unhurried, deliberate
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Invokes Stasi authority and threatens arrest of anyone following him
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Produces identification, states his rank and ministry, and demands immediate contact with his superior — he will not say another word
